user.title: Dangbei Projector
user.description: Connect Home Assistant directly to a Dangbei projector via its WebSocket control endpoint. Optionally also configure a companion ESP32 wake-up device (esp32-dangbei-wol) to support remote power-on.

zeroconf_confirm.title: ESP32 wake-up device found
zeroconf_confirm.description: Discovered an ESP32 Dangbei wake-up device at {host} (id: {id}). Continue to configure the projector connection details.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach projector WebSocket. Check host/port and that the projector is powered on.
error.wol_cannot_connect: Cannot reach the ESP32 wake-up device. Check its IP / port / token.
error.wol_firmware_too_old: The ESP32 firmware is too old for wake-profile settings. Upgrade esp32-dangbei-wol first.
error.wol_sync_failed: The ESP32 wake-up device rejected or failed to save the wake-profile settings.
error.invalid_wake_custom_format: Choose a valid custom wake format.
error.missing_wake_custom_hex: Enter a custom wake packet in hexadecimal form.
error.invalid_wake_custom_hex: The custom wake hex is invalid or exceeds the allowed size.
